creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Hmm. From the postscript to L2ARC-related <https://github.com/openzfs/zfs/discussions/13478#discussioncomment-5694740>: 

> … Compare that with the screenshot in the previous comment, taken around 
> ninety minutes earlier, when the Netdata view of things had no gap at the 
> far right of the timeline.
> 
> Shutdown was around 11:58 (BOOT was at 12:00:28), now there appears to be a 
> gap of around three hours.
